pageContext.name: The Wrong Trousers
pageContext.description: 'It's the wrong trousers! The wrong trousers!'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the The Wrong Trousers Fine Art Print by Mark Bell!  This 16.5 x 23.4 unframed pigment print is hand-numbered on 270gsm Mowhawk archival paper. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for fans of Wallace and Gromit!
